mapper.select:
select rc_learn.invitation_table.id, rc_learn.invitation_table.creat_time, rc_learn.invitation_table.state, rc_learn.invitation_table.title, rc_learn.invitation_table.type, rc_learn.invitation_table.likenumber, rc_learn.invitation_table.commentnumber, rc_learn.invitation_table.visitnumber, rc_learn.invitation_table.coverImgUrl, rc_learn.invitation_table.context, rc_personal.user_table.nick_name
from rc_learn.invitation_table left JOIN rc_personal.user_table ON rc_learn.invitation_table.userId = rc_personal.user_table.id
where rc_learn.invitation_table.state = 0
order by creat_time desc

select rc_learn.incitaion_imag_table.url from rc_learn.incitaion_imag_table JOIN rc_learn.invitation_table ON rc_learn.invitation_table.id = rc_learn.incitaion_imag_table.iid WHERE rc_learn.invitation_table.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE rc_learn.invitation_table set rc_learn.invitation_table.state = 1 WHERE rc_learn.invitation_table.id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId, rc_personal.basic_info_table.QQ, rc_personal.basic_info_table.address, rc_personal.basic_info_table.email, rc_personal.basic_info_table.id, rc_personal.basic_info_table.medals, rc_personal.basic_info_table.messageId, rc_personal.basic_info_table.phone, rc_personal.basic_info_table.professional, rc_personal.basic_info_table.sex, rc_personal.basic_info_table.skills_tree_id, rc_personal.user_table.image_url as imgUrl
FROM rc_personal.basic_info_table JOIN rc_personal.user_table ON rc_personal.user_table.id = rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId
where rc_personal.user_table.state = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE rc_personal.user_table set rc_personal.user_table.state = 1 WHERE rc_personal.user_table.id = #{userId}
